title: Vision Sequence for Detecting One Target
description:
Vision Sequence for Detecting One Target

Vision Sequence for Detecting One Target

When the mobile camera or fixed downward/upward camera whose reference point type is "EndEffector" is used, the sequence will search for one calibration target in the entire field of view.

Be sure to define the size of the search window as large as the entire image display (see figure below).  The X and Y results for the last object in the sequence will be used by the calibration software during calibration. For available objects, refer to Vision Guide 8.0 Properties and Results Reference  PixelXYU Result.

Vision object search window sized to cover entire image display
